summary: Area Printer Auto-Routing Feature - All tests passed. Backend endpoint GET /api/order/{order_id}/area-printer works correctly. Frontend shows 'Otra impresora' button with Settings icon in pre-cuenta dialog for manual override.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/order/{order_id}/area-printer correctly returns has_area_printer, area_id, area_name, channel_code, printer_name
send_precheck_to_printer() correctly implements priority: 1) channel_override, 2) area receipt printer, 3) shift terminal printer, 4) global receipt fallback
Frontend checkAreaPrinter() correctly calls the new endpoint before showing printer modal
Frontend handlePrintPreCheckToPhysical() auto-routes to area printer when available
'Otra impresora' button with Settings icon correctly triggers handleManualPrinterSelect() for manual override
Area channel mappings API (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) all working correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed, 2 skipped due to no active orders)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements present and functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Area printer auto-routing feature fully tested. Backend: GET /api/order/{order_id}/area-printer returns area printer info. send_precheck_to_printer() prioritizes: channel_override > area printer > shift terminal > global receipt. Frontend: checkAreaPrinter() checks area printer before showing modal, 'Otra impresora' button allows manual override. Physical printers are MOCKED in preview environment.

frontend_auto_routing.description: handlePrintPreCheckToPhysical() checks area printer first, auto-routes if available

mocked_apis.Physical printers: Not available in preview environment - print queue logic works but actual printing cannot be tested
